task_type: Type B read-only evaluation artifact (no code, no DB write)

rejection_reasons: Missing explicit P256A NULL risk boundary acknowledgement — P258A prompt required survival argument against P256A/L82/L91/L86/L89; not discharged.

Cross-lottery lagged signal is a closed line: L106 documents BL-PL (24 periods) and 539-BL (193 periods) cross-lottery Pearson tests all p>0.16, zero Bonferroni survivors; proposal gives no argument distinguishing D1 from this closed line.

Composite multi-dimensional regime classifier (entropy + dispersion + parity + residue + gap -> regime labels) over BIG_LOTTO canonical 2,114 draws and POWER_LOTTO 1,917 draws matches L86/L89 overfit pattern flagged by CEO risk framing as highest false-positive risk; no power analysis for per-regime samples provided.
Eligibility criterion 'explicit P256A NULL risk boundary' not met.
evaluation_results.rubric_notes: Good methodological hygiene (timestamp filter, BH-FDR+Bonferroni, OOS, McNemar vs P257A) but dragged down by L106 pre-falsification and thin per-regime samples over low draw counts.

hard_rejection_reasons: Rule 11 — failure to respect prior negative evidence: directly re-proposes the L82/L91-falsified set-geometry family (sum, span, sorted gap vector, odd-even structure, low-mid-high buckets, pairwise distance, modular residue) without any survival argument. These exact descriptors are covered by L73 (539 Zone/Sum white noise, Ljung-Box non-significant, ZPI permanently closed), L91 (BIG_LOTTO 6 randomness tests including pairwise correlation and permutation entropy all pass), L104 (539 residue/tail-digit = pool-structural artifact not exploitable, permanently closed), and L105 (539 gap/consecutive pattern rejected chi2=2.035 p=0.565).

Rule 11 (reinforcement) — conformal prediction wrapper provides coverage validity, not predictive power; a well-calibrated geometry band over proven-random draws still covers astronomically many combinations, yielding zero per-number edge.
Proposal's own concession ('may ultimately reduce to a null if lottery draw-set geometry is fully random') confirms awareness of the closed lines; the mandatory P258A survival argument is absent.

evaluation_results.rubric_notes: Passes all 12 hard-rejection rules. Uniquely institutionalises prior negative evidence (P256A/L82/L91/L86/L89) as the gate's core premise. Proposes no number-scoring rule; it is a meta-validation/selection gate — genuinely different category. Adds provenance+timestamp verification, empirical-null-percentile, BH-FDR+Bonferroni, observation-only constraints, and makes production-mutation an explicit failure criterion.
evaluation_results.methodology_not_predictor_caveat: D3 is a VALIDATION / ADVERSARIAL-NULL SURVIVOR GATE, not a number-prediction method. It cannot claim improved prediction accuracy. It can only be used to pre-register a stricter falsification gate for future candidate methods. All gate survivors remain read-only / observation-only. It must not touch recommendation logic, production, DB, registry, controlled_apply, or deployment without a separate explicit authorization.

selected_candidate.rationale: Only direction passing all five eligibility criteria. Its premise directly institutionalises the rejection discipline stated as this protocol's value: 'many prior apparent edges were null artifacts' mirrors P256A NULL/L82/L91/L86/L89. Selected as at-most-one candidate per decision rules.
selected_candidate.methodology_not_predictor_caveat: D3 is a validation/adversarial-null survivor gate, not a predictive signal or production edge. The next read-only pre-registration task (P258C) designs the gate methodology — not a number-prediction prototype.
selected_candidate.human_gate_fork: If CEO requires this round to yield a genuine predictive signal, the honest reading is that zero predictive-signal directions survived (D1 insufficient, D2 hard-rejected) and the round should be classified P258B_NO_ELIGIBLE_EXTERNAL_DIRECTION. This fork is surfaced for human ruling. Current classification selects D3 per the written decision rules (no 'must be predictive signal' criterion in the rules).

d1_resubmission_path: D1 CrossLotteryLaggedEntropyRegime may be resubmitted with (a) explicit P256A/L82/L91 survival argument, (b) L106 differentiation argument, (c) per-regime power analysis for BIG_LOTTO 2,114 and POWER_LOTTO 1,917 draw counts.

recommended_next_task.title: D3 AdversarialNullSurvivorGate read-only pre-registration design
recommended_next_task.type: Type B read-only design artifact — no prototype, no DB write, no recommendation mutation, no production change
recommended_next_task.scope: Design the adversarial null-gating methodology: matched-null construction specification, correction family pre-declaration, endpoints, OOS schedule, provenance requirements, and evaluation criteria. Observation-only throughout.
recommended_next_task.strong_model_reason: Designing matched-null construction, correction family, endpoints, and OOS schedule for a meta-validation gate requires careful statistical reasoning and judgment on edge cases.
